# vector: enum_resp_2entries
# ENUM_RESP：总数 10，本页 2 条（vel_kp 参数 + iq_meas 快组示波通道）
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 51830003005e000a000000020076656c5f6b70000000000000000000000400010012a00000000000000000c8420000803f000000000000000069715f6d6561730000000000000000000000020044a0000000000000000000000ad7233c0000000001000000874f497a
wire: 0351830203025e020a010102020776656c5f6b70010101010101010101020402010312a00101010101010103c8420103803f010101010101010869715f6d6561730101010101010101010102020344a0010101010101010101050ad7233c0101010201010105874f497a00
